source_jobs.title: Product Designer
source_jobs.description:
📍 LOCATION: SAN FRANCISCO / PALO ALTO, CALIFORNIA


💼 JOB TYPE: FULL-TIME




🚀 COMPANY:

Avala is a mission-driven company that operates as a two-sided marketplace at the intersection of the labor economy and the AI revolution. At this intersection lies an incredible opportunity to redefine the future of labor while ensuring we build AI systems that are highly aligned with human values and intent.

Our platform works towards this alignment by enabling the continuous integration of human feedback and human input at scale. Unlike traditional crowdsourcing or data annotation, Avala dynamically orchestrates digital assembly lines with the precision and unit economics of a Gigafactory. This allows us to rapidly scale to meet the demands of complex data labeling workflows and high-volume content moderation tasks to a global audience.

We understand that the development of AI has the potential to bring about significant social and economic changes, and we're committed to ensuring that these changes are positive and inclusive. Avala is designed to empower individuals and communities on every corner of the Earth with a platform to participate in the curation and moderation of AI systems.




👨🏾‍🚀 FOUNDER:

Founded in May 2020 by Emal Alwis, a six-year veteran of the Tesla Autopilot. Avala aims to solve some of our world’s most pressing challenges by empowering communities with dignified digital work so that every human being can have access to an equitable wage from anywhere, at any time, with just a smartphone.




💻 THE ROLE:

We are looking for a Product Designer who can tackle impossible problems, deliver innovative solutions and drive change in our industry. This is an opportunity to make a significant impact and be rewarded with significant ownership. We're looking for someone self-driven, who thrives in the very early stages of a company.




🏗️ RESPONSIBILITIES:

 - As a Product Designer at Avala you will develop and design simple, beautiful, user friendly solutions to complex design requirements.

 - You will be responsible for the overall design roadmap, design thinking and fundamental principles of product design.

 - Create best-in-class experiences for mobile apps and web applications and utilize a range of tools to articulate your ideas and bring them to life as prototypes and final products.

 - Collaborate with Avala’s Operations, Product, Community, and Engineering teams to define and implement innovative solutions for the product direction, visuals and experience. 

 - Approach design from a user’s perspective: listen to users and translate and prioritize their needs alongside business objectives and technical capabilities into joyful experiences for our users.


YOU'LL ENJOY THIS ROLE IF YOU CAN

 - Be actively curious. Avala has more complex dimensions than most companies and you’ll have to understand and harness them to be effective. That motivates you more than it intimidates you.

 - Be extremely resourceful. There is no playbook for what we’re doing and it excites you that you’ll have to find solutions across a broad array of problems.

 - Thrive in a constantly changing environment. You don’t subscribe to sunk cost fallacy and you understand that because the organization is rapidly learning that means it will also be rapidly changing.

 - Care about the best outcome. We don’t do hierarchy for hierarchy’s sake. If an intern has the best idea you will take it and implement it. If you are wrong in an assumption you will be upfront about it, own it and correct it instead of defending it or hiding it. 

 - Believe in meritocracy with humility. When you’re the right person to solve a problem you do so without being asked. If someone else can do it better, you support them without defending your territory. You can put ego aside, recognizing that we are all on the same team trying to achieve the same mission.


🎓 REQUIREMENTS:

 - Previous work as a user interface/graphics designer with hands-on experience working wit

source_jobs.title: Lead Backend Software Engineer, Digital Assembly Line
source_jobs.description:
📍 LOCATION: SAN FRANCISCO / PALO ALTO, CALIFORNIA


💼 JOB TYPE: FULL-TIME




🚀 COMPANY:

Avala is a mission-driven company that operates as a two-sided marketplace at the intersection of the labor economy and the AI revolution. At this intersection lies an incredible opportunity to redefine the future of labor while ensuring we build AI systems that are highly aligned with human values and intent.

Our platform works towards this alignment by enabling the continuous integration of human feedback and human input at scale. Unlike traditional crowdsourcing or data annotation, Avala dynamically orchestrates digital assembly lines with the precision and unit economics of a Gigafactory. This allows us to rapidly scale to meet the demands of complex data labeling workflows and high-volume content moderation tasks to a global audience.

We understand that the development of AI has the potential to bring about significant social and economic changes, and we're committed to ensuring that these changes are positive and inclusive. Avala is designed to empower individuals and communities on every corner of the Earth with a platform to participate in the curation and moderation of AI systems.




👨🏾‍🚀 FOUNDER:

Founded in May 2020 by Emal Alwis, a six-year veteran of the Tesla Autopilot. Avala aims to solve some of our world’s most pressing challenges by empowering communities with dignified digital work so that every human being can have access to an equitable wage from anywhere, at any time, with just a smartphone.




💻 THE ROLE:

As a lead member of the Avala Engineering team, you will design and implement a diverse set of tools that orchestrate Avala’s Digital Assembly Line. Supporting our AI-assisted human labeling and various machine learning workflows.



The Digital Assembly Line is a central part of Avala. The systems you build will have a large impact on the entire lifecycle of Avala’s full-stack ML Ops platform. This includes data curation, processing, data discovery, annotation, and visualization. This also includes tools that help us automate the entire workflow of training, validation, and deploying customer models to production.



As a backend engineer, you bring top-notch software engineering skills and can contribute to our tooling systems immediately. Knowledge of machine learning, computer vision, or neural networks is a plus but not required. That can be learned on the job. A strong candidate for the team will either be an excellent software generalist or someone who is exceptionally strong in backend engineering.




🏗️ RESPONSIBILITIES:

 - Take ownership of the architecture, design, development, deployment, and operations of the backend API stack you will develop, using software engineering best practices, and other cutting-edge methodologies

 - Design and implement large-scale data processing pipelines that handle a diverse set of Avala-related data such as images, videos, text, audio, neural networks, and human annotations.

 - Design and implement tools, tests, metrics, and dashboards to accelerate the development cycle of our model training.

 - Work closely with frontend engineers to seamlessly integrate with backend systems.

 - Influence architectural decisions with focus on security, scalability, reliability and high performance.

 - Setup and maintain monitoring, metrics & reporting systems for fine-grained observability and actionable alerting.

 - Collaborate with colleagues in design and code reviews.

 - Develop means for deploying, scaling, and monitoring software systems.

 - Characterize complex problems related to the scalability, reliability, performance, and security of the software.

 - Own projects and always seeks ways to improve efficiency and operations.

 - Contribute relevant, clean, concise quality documentation to Avala’s knowledge base to support/increase organizational information sharing.

 - Evangelize best practices in Software development and Software development lifecycle.




🎓

source_jobs.title: 3D Computer Vision Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Job Category: AI & Robotics




ABOUT AVALA AI

Avala AI is an AI Data Infrastructure company operating at the intersection of real-world AI and the labor economy. We specialize in high-quality data labeling, dataset management, and data visualization—offering 4D labeling solutions for autonomous vehicles, humanoid robots, and drone applications. Our mission is to empower AI-driven industries—AV companies, robotics innovators, and drone enterprises—with the data infrastructure needed to accelerate the next generation of intelligent systems, while also providing dignified digital work to individuals around the globe.




THE ROLE

As a 3D Computer Vision Engineer at Avala AI, you will design and implement state-of-the-art solutions for offline and online 3D reconstruction and scene understanding that are robust, accurate, and performant. You’ll work on a world-class spatial computing platform deployed at scale for autonomous vehicles, advanced robotic systems, and drone technologies. Your efforts will push the boundaries of real-world AI while leveraging modern deep learning and 3D computer vision techniques.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Spatial Computing & Reconstruction: Develop cutting-edge solutions using NeRFs, Diffusion Models, Gaussian Splatting, Multiview Stereo, TSDF Fusion, Structure from Motion, and SLAM.

 - Mission-Critical Perception: Create robust 3D perception and scene understanding systems that enhance safety and performance for a wide range of robotics and AV applications.

 - 4D Data Labeling & Visualization: Collaborate with cross-functional teams to refine and scale Avala’s 4D labeling platform for cars, humanoid robots, and drones.

 - Software Engineering Best Practices: Employ strong coding, testing, and deployment practices to develop novel work quickly, safely, and efficiently.

 - Boundary-Pushing Innovation: Continuously explore new methods and technologies that push the envelope in 3D vision, neural rendering, and large-scale data processing.




WHAT YOU’LL BRING

 - 3D Vision & Graphics Expertise: Experience with camera models, multi-view geometry, rendering pipelines, and one or more specialized areas such as object detection/tracking, pose estimation, depth estimation, panoptic segmentation, 3D reconstruction, visual SLAM, or neural rendering (e.g. NeRFs, Gaussian Splatting).

 - Solid Mathematical Fundamentals: Proficiency in linear algebra, computational geometry, vector calculus, probability theory, and numerical optimization.

 - Deep Learning Knowledge: Familiarity with modern architectures (transformers, diffusion models, autoregressive models, CNNs, etc.) and associated frameworks (PyTorch, TensorFlow, etc.).

 - Plus Skills: Experience with real-time graphics, sensor fusion, signal processing, computational photography, or robotics is a bonus.

 - Strong Engineering Foundations: Adherence to best practices in software development, ability to write clean and maintainable code, and a team-focused mindset for code reviews and collaboration.




PAY TRANSPARENCY (CALIFORNIA ONLY)

Base Salary Range: $130,000 – $190,000/year + cash + stock awards + benefits

Your actual base salary and level will be determined on a case-by-case basis, factoring in job-related knowledge, skills, education, and experience. Base salary is only one aspect of total rewards at Avala; employees are also eligible for equity and comprehensive benefits.




WHAT WE OFFER

 - Mission-Driven Work: Build solutions that positively impact underserved communities while innovating at the cutting edge of AI.

 - Career Growth: Rapid advancement opportunities for those who deliver outsized impact.

 - Excellent Insurance: Comprehensive medical, dental, and vision coverage starting Day 1.

 - Parental Leave: Flexible parental leave that supports work-life integration.

 - Time Off: Flexible time off + paid holidays.

 - Generous Equity & 401(k): Competitive ownership stakes in the company and robust retirement savings.




EQUAL OPPO

notes: Avala is a mission-driven company operating at the intersection of labor economy and AI revolution.
